title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ISAAC LOPEZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN MANDALUYONG CITY INTO AN INTEGRATED SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE ISAAC LOPEZ INTEGRATED SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. NO. 6062 / 100 OG No. 32, 19 Supp. (Aug. 9, 2004) ; 20 VLD 2d 13

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9300, June 29, 2004 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE ISAAC LOPEZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN MANDALUYONG CITY INTO AN INTEGRATED SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE ISAAC LOPEZ INTEGRATED SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Conversion into an Integrated School.

芒聙聰 The Isaac Lopez Elementary School in Mandaluyong City is hereby converted into an integrated school to be known as the Isaac Lopez Integrated School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聰 All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Isaac Lopez Elementary School are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Isaac Lopez Integrated School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Isaac Lopez Integrated School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year芒聙聶s appropriations of the Isaac Lopez Elementary School and thereafter in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations to implement this Act.

SEC. 5

. Effectivity.

芒聙聰 This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of the Senate

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 5, 2003 and June 10, 2004, respectively.

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: June 29, 2004

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
